CHART 138
The native will be a devotional
type. He will have reverence for elders Mars Ven.
and will be a learned man. He will
have 4-5 children. As the Sun is as
Dh. Sun
pected by Saturn from Capricorn and
Venus is in Gemini (12th from the
Jupt.
Sun), the father of the native will not sat.
Mer.
live long. As there are Mercury, Jupi Dt.
ter and Ketu in the 2nd house to the
Sun, the father will attain Moksha as a
result of his learning and good deeds.
This native was cursed by elders in the previous birth. Therefore, he lost
his father early in this life and will have to undergo difficulties thereafter. He.
will be employed in a cinema concern; but will be receiving only meagre
salary. His mind will be verychangeable. Marriage is indicated at 25 or 28.
Between 35-38, he will serve in some public institution. If the native recites
